project: Meal Prep Revolution male photo character sandbox
hostingSink: GitHub repo jacobjharman-create/prometheus-design-studios-ai-studio, branch hostinger-live, folder pds-flows-workbench/mpr-male-photo/

lowResWiring.geographyLock: Character A left/near side facing right; Character B right/opposite side facing left across the squat rack.

firstGenerationRules.mode: low-resolution wiring and lip-sync proof only
firstGenerationRules.resolution: lowest practical setting, preferably 720p or lower
firstGenerationRules.generationUnit: one TTS line to one lip-sync/video node
firstGenerationRules.premiumGate: no upscale, final grade, or premium professional render until low-res assembly is approved

notes: This sandbox publishes the durable local photo references, character cards, voice picks, and Flow link.
Generated ElevenLabs reference images were created in Flow but the temporary signed URLs were not portable when building the live sandbox.
Audio samples were played in the ElevenLabs Flow session; stable downloadable audio files are not included yet.
